```{r}
library(car)
cloglog_model <- glm(formula = Revenue ~ (.),
family = binomial(link = "cloglog"),
data = train_df_smote)

summary(cloglog_model)

```

```{r}
vif(cloglog_model)
```

```{r}
train_df_smote <- train_df_smote %>% 
  select(-c(ProductRelated))

cloglog_model <- glm(formula = Revenue ~ .,
family = binomial(link = "cloglog"),
data = train_df_smote)

vif(cloglog_model)

```
